notableEvents.label: Alex Bregman plunked
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman hit by pitch. Nico Hoerner to 3rd. Michael Busch to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner grounds into a double play, shortstop Jeremy Peña to second baseman Brice Matthews to first baseman Christian Walker. Pedro Ramírez to 3rd. Pete Crow-Armstrong out at 2nd. Nico Hoerner out at 1st.
